# AI Relationship Court - Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Building a modern, cinematic AI courtroom drama app using Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Dark luxury aesthetic with red/gold accents, witty dialogue, and meme-inspired design.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14+
- React 18+
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
- Dark cinematic theme with red/gold accents

## Project Progress

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md creation
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (detailed user requirements provided)
- [x] Scaffold the Project (Next.js app with all pages and components created)
- [x] Customize the Project (styling and animations implemented)
- [x] Compile the Project (dependencies installed, dev server running)
- [x] Create and Run Task (dev server task created and running on port 3000)
- [x] Launch the Project (app running successfully at http://localhost:3000)
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README.md and instructions updated)

## Key Features
1. Landing page with hero section and "Start Case" button
2. Case setup page (title, names, arguments, mood selection)
3. AI Courtroom with judge, two lawyers, dramatic conversation
4. Final verdict card with shareable results
5. Animations, transitions, and cinematic effects
6. Mock AI responses (ready for API integration)

## Architecture
Reusable components:
- JudgePanel
- LawyerBubble
- VerdictCard
- CourtroomLayout
- TypingAnimation
- ObjectionPopup

Design: Netflix courtroom drama + meme culture + AI roleplay
